sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: This chapter introduces sounds & spelling for learners of Sesotho. Study the patterns and practice with short examples every day.
sections.learner_tip: Review this section twice: once for rules, once aloud for fluency.

sections.heading: Practice
sections.body: Apply sounds & spelling in simple sentences about daily life. Combine new words with what you already know in Sesotho.
